commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Having. Hebrew, "But ye are sewers of lies. "(Calmet)
Septuagint, "unskilful surgeons, (who, instead of sewing up a wound, increase it) and all of you doctors of evil "vain empirics.
Maintainers. Protestants, "ye are all physicians of no value. "(Haydock)

commentaries.author: Gregory The Dialogist
commentaries.content: 34. By which same words it is clearly shewn that his friends as in the likeness of heretics oppose the decisions of the holy man’s judgment. For it is clear that they do not hold the figure of Catholics, who are termed ‘votaries of wrong doctrines.’ Wherein this likewise ought to be marked, that they are called ‘builders of lies.’ For as an edifice is ‘built’ with stones, so a lie is ‘built’ with words. For when there is not deceitful speech, but a meaning of truth, it is like a fortified mound, arising not by fabrication, but by nature.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
